name: Royal Card Clash
author: Poki
description: Royal Card Clash is an exhilarating card game where you have to strategically play numbered cards in order to beat the royal cards. Each turn, you have a choice to play three cards in three different lanes. Cards of each suit can damage each royal, but only a card of the same suit can take out a royal card. You'll have to be strategic about which cards you play and when, otherwise you'll run out of cards! Do you have what it takes to reign supreme in Royal Card Clash? How to play Royal Card Clash? Use the mouse to play the cards in the right lane! Who created Royal Card Clash? Royal Card Clash is created by Gearhead Games. Play their other games on Poki: Retro Highway and Scrap Divers How can I play Royal Card Clash for free? You can play Royal Card Clash for free on Poki. Can I play Royal Card Clash on mobile devices and desktop? Royal Card Clash can be played on your computer and mobile devices
